name: 包豪斯 - 复古
description: 红蓝黄三原色 #E30613/#004D9F/#F5A623，粗黑边框，几何构成主义风格，适合设计师、创意类内容

h1.base: font-size: 31px; font-weight: 900; color: #ffffff; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.16; letter-spacing: -0.02em; padding: 10px 14px 9px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #E30613 0%, #E30613 64%, #004D9F 64%, #004D9F 86%, #F5A623 86%, #F5A623 100%); border: 3px solid #1a1a1a; box-shadow: 6px 6px 0 #1a1a1a; margin-top: 26px; margin-bottom: 18px

h2.base: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #1a1a1a; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.35; letter-spacing: 0.08em; padding: 8px 16px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #F5A623 0%, #F5A623 68%, #ffffff 68%, #ffffff 100%); border-left: 10px solid #004D9F; border-top: 3px solid #1a1a1a; border-bottom: 3px solid #1a1a1a; margin-top: 24px; margin-bottom: 18px

h3.base: font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a1a; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.45; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 6px 12px; background: #ffffff; border-left: 3px solid #E30613; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 14px

base.base: font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; color: #555555; border-left: 2px solid #E30613; padding: 0; margin-top: 14px; margin-bottom: 6px; line-height: 1.3

styles.paragraph: font-size: 15px; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.65; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 18px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-align: left
styles.quote: border-left: 6px solid #F5A623; border-right: 2px solid #004D9F; border-top: 2px solid #1a1a1a; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff4d6 0%, #fff8ea 100%); padding: 16px 20px; margin-top: 24px; margin-bottom: 24px; border-radius: 0; font-size: 16px; color: #333333; line-height: 1.65

header.container: display: flex; align-items: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background: #e0e0e0

code.block: background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 0; margin-top: 24px; margin-bottom: 24px; overflow: hidden; border-left: 6px solid #E30613
code.inline: background: #f0f0f0; padding: 3px 6px; border-radius: 0; font-size: 13px; color: #004D9F; font-family: 'SF Mono', Consolas, monospace

styles.image: max-width: 100%; border-radius: 0; display: block; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #1a1a1a; border: 2px solid #1a1a1a

emphasis.strong: font-weight: 900; color: #ffffff; background: #E30613; padding: 0 6px; display: inline

table.container: width: 100%; border-collapse: separate; margin-top: 24px; margin-bottom: 24px; font-size: 15px; border-spacing: 0; border-radius: 0; overflow: hidden
table.header: background: #004D9F; padding: 16px 16px; border: 3px solid #1a1a1a; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff

styles.hr: margin-top: 36px; margin-bottom: 36px; height: 6px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #E30613 0%, #E30613 33.33%, #004D9F 33.33%, #004D9F 66.66%, #F5A623 66.66%, #F5A623 100%); border: none

dialogue.title: text-align: center; font-size: 14px; color: #999; margin: 0 0 12px 0;
dialogue.bubbleLeft: max-width: 80%; background: #fff; border-left: 3px solid #E30613; border-radius: 0 12px 12px 12px; padding: 10px 14px; margin: 8px auto 8px 0;
dialogue.bubbleRight: max-width: 80%; background: #E3061314; border-right: 3px solid #E30613; border-radius: 12px 0 12px 12px; padding: 10px 14px; margin: 8px 0 8px auto;
dialogue.speaker: font-size: 12px; color: #999; margin: 0 0 4px 0;

gallery.title: text-align: center; font-size: 14px; color: #999; margin: 0 0 12px 0;
gallery.scroll: display: flex; overflow-x: auto; gap: 12px; padding: 4px 0; scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
gallery.item: flex: 0 0 auto; width: 200px; height: 200px; scroll-snap-align: start; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid #E3061320;
